description: Quick fixes to complete the landing page - Stripe checkout integration, Google Meet scheduler, video section, toggle default, and button alignment

userStories.title: Default yearly toggle
userStories.description: Change monthly/yearly billing toggle to default to yearly instead of monthly
acceptanceCriteria: In PricingPlans.tsx, change useState(false) to useState(true) for isYearly state
When page loads, yearly pricing is shown by default
Save badge is visible on initial load
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Changed useState(false) to useState(true) on line 95

userStories.title: Schedule a Call opens Google Meet
userStories.description: Enterprise 'Schedule a Call' button should open Google Calendar scheduling link instead of mailto
acceptanceCriteria: In PricingPlans.tsx handleSelectPlan function, for Enterprise tier
Change window.open from mailto:sales@haste.nyc to https://calendar.app.google/BBFibVC74CU2MQY37
Link opens in new tab (_blank)
No mailto link is used for Enterprise tier
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Changed window.open URL from mailto:sales@haste.nyc to Google Calendar link

userStories.title: Select Plan triggers Stripe checkout
userStories.description: Clicking 'Select Plan' on Freelancer or Studio tiers should initiate Stripe checkout using the existing useCheckout hook
acceptanceCriteria: In PricingSection.tsx, import useCheckout hook from @/hooks/useCheckout
Destructure { isLoading, startCheckout } from useCheckout()
Create handleSelectPlan function that calls startCheckout with priceId and customerEmail: 'guest@checkout.com'
Pass onSelectPlan={handleSelectPlan} prop to PricingPlans
Optionally show loading state while checkout initializes
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Added useCheckout hook integration with loading overlay. handleSelectPlan calls startCheckout with priceId and guest email.

userStories.title: Replace Watch Demo with Video Section
userStories.description: Remove 'Watch Demo' link from HeroSection and add VideoSection with Vimeo embed between Hero and Features
acceptanceCriteria: In HeroSection.tsx, remove the 'Watch Demo' anchor link (lines ~124-136)
In HeroSection.tsx, remove the 'Product Screenshot' placeholder div (lines ~140-153)
Create src/components/VideoSection.tsx with Vimeo embed (video ID: 1081347302)
VideoSection has blue radial gradient background effect
VideoSection has 'See it in action' text below video
In Index.tsx, import VideoSection and add it between HeroSection and FeatureSection
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Removed Watch Demo link and Product Screenshot placeholder from HeroSection.tsx. Added id='video' to existing VideoSection.tsx. Added VideoSection between Hero and Features in Index.tsx.

userStories.title: Align pricing card buttons at bottom
userStories.description: All pricing card buttons should be at the same vertical position relative to the bottom of their card, regardless of feature list length
acceptanceCriteria: In PricingPlans.tsx, ensure Card component uses flex flex-col
Add flex-grow to CardContent so it expands to fill available space
CardFooter stays at the bottom with mt-auto
All three cards have buttons at the same distance from card bottom
Visual alignment is consistent across Freelancer, Studio, and Enterprise cards
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Added flex flex-col to Card, flex-grow to CardContent, and mt-auto to CardFooter for consistent button alignment
